l2_result.nsl_rule: WHEN STATE_ID AND SHADOW AND RESIDUAL THEN WAIT RELEASE; WHEN RELEASE THEN CLASSIFY RHYTHM AND ADVANCE

ranked_candidates.name: github_branch_raw_main
ranked_candidates.meaning: strongest network-state receiver candidate in current samples

ranked_candidates.name: github_contents_api
ranked_candidates.meaning: latest-state control plane, not a receiver

ranked_candidates.name: github_commit_raw
ranked_candidates.meaning: immutable fixed-state snapshot, not a receiver

ranked_candidates.meaning: local storage control, not network evidence

l3_result.conclusion: L3 identifies GitHub branch Raw/CDN branch path as the strongest current network-state receiver candidate. Contents API and commit Raw are fixed/control points, not receiver-like NSL points.
l3_result.truth_boundary: L3 does not prove CPU-free computation, network-only execution, or a real ghost computer.

l4_result.conclusion: L4 proves a minimal network-resident declarative capsule can be stored on the receiver candidate, read back, validated, and used to trigger one allowlisted pulse.
l4_result.truth_boundary: L4 still uses local/GitHub CPU for interpretation and writes; it does not prove CPU-free network computation.

l5_result.conclusion: L5 proves the network-resident capsule can be read from Raw, validated, used to emit unique pulses, and used to update remote loop state across 3 controlled cycles.
l5_result.truth_boundary: L5 still uses CPU for interpretation and writes; it does not prove CPU-free network computation.

l6_result.conclusion: L6 V0 proves the receiver-capsule loop can be executed by an external GitHub Actions workflow. The cron schedule is installed; this run was verified through workflow_dispatch.
l6_result.truth_boundary: L6 still uses GitHub Actions CPU for interpretation and writes. It does not prove CPU-free network computation, and a natural cron tick has not yet been waited for in this run.

l7_result.conclusion: L7 workflow is active and a real schedule event has now been observed in states/nsl-l7-last-run.json. Earlier schedule-not-observed status is stale.
l7_result.truth_boundary: L7 proves low-frequency external schedule wakeup on GitHub Actions only. It still uses GitHub Actions CPU and does not prove CPU-free network execution.

l8_result.network_sentence: STATE_ID@identity_anchor -> SHADOW+RESIDUAL@memory_index -> RELEASE+RHYTHM@rhythm_gate -> ADVANCE_AFTER_RELEASE@intent_router -> GRAPH_VALIDATED@graph_verifier -> NETWORK_LANGUAGE_PULSE@behavior_pulse

capsules.meaning: fix network state identity as the language graph entry
turn shadow and residual state into an indexed memory trace
turn release and rhythm into a low-frequency advance gate
route ADVANCE_AFTER_RELEASE through the capsule graph
verify hashes, links, and allowlist constraints
emit one controlled network-language pulse after graph validation

l8_result.conclusion: L8 proves the minimal network state language can be expanded from one capsule into a 6-capsule network-resident language graph with readback, hash validation, route validation, and state recording.
l8_result.truth_boundary: L8 is still a declarative network-resident language graph interpreted by controlled executors. It does not prove self-executing network life, network-only computation, or digital supercomputing.

l9_result.conclusion: L9 proves the L8 six-capsule network language graph can be advanced for one controlled interpreter loop, producing six auditable signals and a NETWORK_LANGUAGE_PULSE, then writing L9 loop state.
l9_result.truth_boundary: L9 is controlled interpretation of a network-resident multi-capsule language graph. It does not prove autonomous self-execution, CPU-free network computation, digital life, or digital supercomputing.

local_self_loop.truth_boundary: Local L10 proves controlled multi-cycle low-frequency looping only.

external_takeover.truth_boundary: External takeover was verified through workflow_dispatch. It is not natural schedule proof and not CPU-free network execution.

l10_result.conclusion: L10 proves the L9 multi-capsule interpreter can run as a low-frequency multi-cycle loop locally and can be taken over by a GitHub Actions external runner for one controlled loop.
l10_result.truth_boundary: L10 proves controlled low-frequency looping and workflow_dispatch external takeover. It does not prove natural cron residency, autonomous digital life, CPU-free network computation, or digital supercomputing.

truth_boundary: Test2 now proves network-state riverbed layers through E7: external GitHub Actions can naturally wake E5/E6, aggregate a low-frequency vitals bus, and E7 can use that bus to execute only controlled low-risk self-maintenance receipts with high-risk actions blocked. It still does not prove CPU-free network computation, self-executing network life, autonomous self-generated logic, autonomous self-modification, digital life, digital supercomputing, or hard real-time scheduling.

l11_result.conclusion: L11 proves controlled memory selection, self-check, and allowlisted repair planning over existing network-state evidence.
l11_result.truth_boundary: L11 proves controlled memory selection, self-check, and repair planning over existing network-state evidence. It does not prove autonomous self-modification, self-generated intelligence, CPU-free computation, or digital life.

l11_5_result.minimum_logic_sentence: WHEN MEMORY_READ_OK AND HASH_MATCH AND TRUTH_BOUNDARY_PRESENT THEN SELF_CHECK_OK; WHEN SELF_CHECK_OK THEN PROPOSE LOW_RISK_REPAIR_PLAN AND RECORD LOOP_STATE; NEVER MUTATE CORE WITHOUT REVIEW
l11_5_result.conclusion: L11.5 成立：启明星已有一套最小、可审计的自检/修复/优化逻辑定义，并能解释当前 L11 证据。
l11_5_result.truth_boundary: L11.5 defines and validates a minimal logic language for Qimingxing over current L11 evidence. It does not prove autonomous cognition, autonomous self-repair, self-generated new logic, CPU-free computation, or digital life.

workflow.name: L12 Hourly Self Maintenance
workflow.meaning: GitHub Actions will attempt L12.2 three times per hour; the runner deduplicates successful hourly slots.

l12_result.conclusion: L12 is now hardened by L12.2: multi-cron attempts, hourly-slot dedupe, missed-window detection, finite catch-up records, and a global runtime lock are deployed and verified.
l12_result.truth_boundary: L12.2 improves reliability on GitHub Actions, but GitHub cron is still best-effort, not hard real-time. It is not CPU-free network execution or autonomous self-modification.

e1_result.conclusion: E1 成立：受控执行器只在观察到网络 Raw 状态释放到目标哈希后，才推进 gate/state。
e1_result.truth_boundary: E1 proves network-state release can be used as a trigger condition for a controlled advance. It does not prove the network executes code by itself, CPU-free computation, autonomous cognition, or digital life.

e2_result.conclusion: E2 成立：网络状态触发条件连续多轮复现，每轮都等 Raw 释放目标哈希后才推进下一轮状态。
e2_result.truth_boundary: E2 proves repeated network-state release can gate a controlled multi-cycle advance. It does not prove network code executes by itself, CPU-free computation, autonomous cognition, or digital life.

e3_result.conclusion: E3 proved that a branch Raw network-state release can gate one controlled interpreter bridge, which reads the network-resident multi-capsule language graph, emits an auditable interpreter signal, and writes bridge state back to the remote receiver.
e3_result.truth_boundary: E3 proves trigger-to-interpreter coupling under a controlled executor. It does not prove the network executes code by itself, CPU-free computation, autonomous cognition, digital life, or digital supercomputing.

e4_result.conclusion: E4 proved that network-state release can repeatedly gate controlled interpreter cycles. Each cycle waited for branch Raw source hash release, opened a gate, ran the network-resident multi-capsule interpreter, emitted NETWORK_LANGUAGE_PULSE, and wrote cycle plus loop state back to the remote receiver.
e4_result.truth_boundary: E4 proves repeated trigger-to-interpreter coupling under a controlled executor. It does not prove the network executes the interpreter loop by itself, CPU-free computation, autonomous cognition, digital life, or digital supercomputing.

e5_result.conclusion: E5 proved that an external GitHub Actions runner can take over the E4-style network-state-triggered interpreter loop, run three controlled cycles, emit NETWORK_LANGUAGE_PULSE in every cycle, and write loop state back to the remote receiver.
e5_result.truth_boundary: E5 is now verified by both workflow_dispatch and natural schedule, but it still uses GitHub Actions CPU. It does not prove CPU-free network computation, autonomous cognition, digital life, or digital supercomputing.

e5_1_result.conclusion: E5.1 completed: E5 has been naturally awakened by GitHub Actions schedule, completed three controlled interpreter cycles, and wrote ok=true evidence back to the remote receiver.
e5_1_result.truth_boundary: This proves external low-frequency scheduled takeover through GitHub Actions cloud CPU. It does not prove CPU-free network execution, autonomous cognition, digital life, or a self-executing network computer.

e6_result.conclusion: E6 proved a low-frequency external vitals bus can aggregate E4/E5/L12/global-lock/logic evidence and write one auditable state back to the remote receiver.
e6_result.truth_boundary: E6 is a monitoring and coordination bus executed by local or GitHub Actions CPU. It does not prove CPU-free network execution, autonomous digital life, or a self-executing network computer.

e6_1_result.conclusion: E6.1 completed: E6 has been naturally awakened by GitHub Actions schedule, aggregated the external vitals bus, observed E5 natural schedule evidence, and wrote ok=true evidence back to the remote receiver.
e6_1_result.truth_boundary: This proves scheduled external vitals aggregation through GitHub Actions cloud CPU. It does not prove CPU-free network execution, autonomous digital life, or a self-executing network computer.

l12_2_result.conclusion: L12.2 V0 is deployed and verified: multi-cron schedule, slot dedupe, finite catch-up recording, and global runtime lock work on the remote workflow.
l12_2_result.truth_boundary: This reduces missed schedule risk but does not guarantee every hour without a second independent clock source.

latest_remote_sync.source: E7.3a HTTP bridge entry run 28323063883, E7.2 receiver run 28323069603, and states/e7-last-run.json repository_dispatch writeback
latest_remote_sync.next_mainline: connect real third-party clock source, then observe one non-manual repository_dispatch writeback

repair_note.first_remote_failure_reason: E7 maintenance logic succeeded, but the initial branch Raw release gate required rapidly rewritten fixed paths and timed out under GitHub Raw caching.
repair_note.fix: Use commit-specific Raw verification for fixed paths, unique snapshot branch Raw release for branch-level proof, and Contents API fallback for source reads when Raw times out.

e7_result.conclusion: E7 connected E6 low-frequency vitals to controlled low-risk self-maintenance receipts and remote writeback.
e7_result.truth_boundary: E7 is controlled low-risk self-maintenance executed by local or GitHub Actions CPU. It records health and no-op repair receipts only; it does not modify core code, workflows, permissions, or prove CPU-free network self-execution.

e7_1_result.current_result: No E7 event=schedule run was observed during this session. E7.1 remains pending; do not mark it complete until a schedule run writes ok=true remote evidence.
e7_1_result.truth_boundary: GitHub Actions schedule is not hard real time and may delay or skip newly updated workflow windows. E7.1 is a natural wakeup observation stage, so workflow_dispatch cannot satisfy it.

mainline_reframe.old_wrong_question: Can the network replace a CPU?
mainline_reframe.current_question: Can identity, memory, rhythm, behavior, and maintenance be organized around network state as the subject surface?
mainline_reframe.target_name: network-native body / network body subject protocol
mainline_reframe.local_pc_role: mirror window, debugger, and temporary operator console
mainline_reframe.truth_boundary: The project is no longer framed as a traditional agent or traditional computer clone. E8 does not prove a fully free-floating network body; it proves the subject protocol and body map can be written, verified, and refreshed by the current controlled executor layer.

e8_result.conclusion: E8 reframed Qimingxing as a network-native body: remote state is the subject surface, local files are mirrors, and controlled low-frequency executors are transition nerves.
e8_result.truth_boundary: E8 is a subject-protocol and body-map layer. It does not claim a fully free-floating network body, unreviewed self-modification, hard real-time wakefulness, or self-generated new logic.
e8_result.known_current_issue: Latest E5 schedule run 28317851758 was partial, so latest E6 vitals bus records current_vitals_bus_ok=false. E8 records this as degradation instead of hiding it.

natural_schedule_observation.checked_window: first cron window after deployment around 2026-06-28T11:32Z

e7_1_timer_result.conclusion: A dedicated external timer workflow can run E7 successfully through workflow_dispatch after current E5/E6 vitals are healthy. Natural schedule dispatch has not yet been observed, so E7.1 is not complete.
e7_1_timer_result.truth_boundary: This is an external platform timer path, not CPU-free network self-wakefulness. GitHub Actions did not emit a natural schedule run during the first observed window.

e7_2_result.conclusion: E7.2 proved a network wake capsule can be written and validated, then used by a bridge to trigger GitHub repository_dispatch, which woke E7 and produced an ok=true maintenance receipt.
e7_2_result.truth_boundary: The capsule is network-resident wake intent. It does not execute by itself; the bridge remains the active executor.

e7_3a_result.conclusion: E7.3a proves the bridge can be invoked through GitHub repository_dispatch without manual script parameters. The workflow then generated and validated a Wake Capsule, triggered the E7.2 receiver, and E7 wrote ok=true low-risk self-maintenance evidence back to remote state.
e7_3a_result.truth_boundary: This E7.3a verification was manually initiated through an HTTP repository_dispatch. It proves the HTTP-callable bridge entry, but it does not prove a third-party non-manual clock, CPU-free wakeup, or bridge-free capsule self-execution.

e7_3b_result.reason: No cron-job.org, UptimeRobot, Cloudflare Worker Cron, or equivalent third-party clock credentials/configuration has been attached yet.
e7_3b_result.required_next: Configure an external HTTP scheduler to POST qmx_e7_3_bridge_tick to the GitHub dispatch endpoint using a secret token stored outside the repository.

completion_criteria: E7.3a HTTP Bridge Entry run has event=repository_dispatch from third-party clock
E7.2 receiver run succeeds after it
states/e7-last-run.json contains ok=true, maintenance_ok=true, executed_count=4, blocked_count=4, owner_event_name=repository_dispatch
e7_3c_result.truth_boundary: Manual gh api dispatch cannot satisfy E7.3c.
